feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: User default values from Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How we can retrieve user's default values from fiori launchpad in a custom UI5 application?
I checked in sap ushell services but could not find any option.
Please suggest.


Thank you!

entry.title: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on parent entity field value in CAP JAVA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a CAP JAVA based oData service, which is composed on a parent and its child entities. Now, we have a requirement to add a Value Help for one of the child entity field. I have a issue here I want to filter records in this Value help on the basis of a field value from its parent entity.

Could you please help?

Thanks,
Shivani

entry.title: Failed to resolve navigation target "#Bank-manageExtended"
entry.content:
Hi all,

I extended the Manage Banks App F1574 using an adaptation project, and when I open the app, it displays the following error message:

Failed to resolve navigation target "#Bank-manageExtended". This is most likely caused by an incorrect SAP Fiori launchpad content configuration or by a missing role assignment.

Here is the target mapping and the tile configuration:

 

The content of the manifest.appdescr_variant

{
  "fileName": "manifest",
  "layer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "fileType": "appdescr_variant",
  "reference": "fin.cash.bankmaster.manage",
  "id": "customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension",
  "namespace": "apps/fin.cash.bankmaster.manage/appVariants/customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension/",
  "content": [
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_app_setTitle",
      "content": {},
      "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
      }
    },
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
      "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n",
        "bundleUrl": "i18n/i18n.properties",
        "supportedLocales": [
          ""
        ],
        "fallbackLocale": ""
      }
    },
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
      "content": {
        "modelId": "@i18n",
        "bundleUrl": "i18n/i18n.properties",
        "supportedLocales": [
          ""
        ],
        "fallbackLocale": ""
      }
    },
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_setMinUI5Version",
      "content": {
        "minUI5Version": "1.108.23"
      }
    }
  ]
}

and /sap/bc/ui2/app_index/ui5_app_info?id=customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension

{
  "customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension": {
    "dependencies": [
      {
        "id": "customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension",
        "componentId": "fin.cash.bankmaster.manage",
        "type": "UI5COMP",
        "url": "/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_bank",
        "descriptorUrl": "/sap/bc/lrep/content/~20251209123247.9324920~/apps/fin.cash.bankmaster.manage/appVariants/customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension/manifest.appdescr_variant",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ui.table",
        "componentId": "sap.ui.table",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.suite.ui.commons",
        "componentId": "sap.suite.ui.commons",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.fe.placeholder",
        "componentId": "sap.fe.placeholder",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ui.core",
        "componentId": "sap.ui.core",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ui.generic.app",
        "componentId": "sap.ui.generic.app",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ui.comp",
        "componentId": "sap.ui.comp",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.m",
        "componentId": "sap.m",
        "type": "UI5LIB",

      },
      {

        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/YBMD_FCLM_BM_SRV/",
        "componentId": "",

        "typeVersion": "2.0",

      {

      },
      {

        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.f",
        "componentId": "sap.f",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template",
        "componentId": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.fin.central.lib",
        "componentId": "sap.fin.central.lib",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_lib",
        "descriptorUrl": "/sap/bc/lrep/content/~20251209123227.4211770~/apps/sap.fin.central.lib/app/sap/fin_lib/manifest.appdescr",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.se.mi.plm.lib.attachmentservice",
        "componentId": "sap.se.mi.plm.lib.attachmentservice",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/plm_ath_cres1",
        "descriptorUrl": "/sap/bc/lrep/content/~20251209123311.4398020~/apps/sap.se.mi.plm.lib.attachmentservice/app/sap/plm_ath_cres1/manifest.appdescr",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/",
        "componentId": "",
        "type": "ODATA",
        "typeVersion": "2.0",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.s4h.cfnd.featuretoggle",
        "componentId": "sap.s4h.cfnd.featuretoggle",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/featuretoggles1",
        "descriptorUrl": "/sap/bc/lrep/content/~20251209123229.0314360~/apps/sap.s4h.cfnd.featuretoggle/app/sap/featuretoggles1/manifest.appdescr",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.collaboration",
        "componentId": "sap.collaboration",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ushell",
        "componentId": "sap.ushell",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "/sap/opu/odata/SAP/CA_FM_FEATURE_TOGGLE_STATUS_SRV",
        "componentId": "",
        "type": "ODATA",
        "typeVersion": "2.0",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension",
        "componentId": "",
        "type": "APPVARID",
        "url": "/sap/bc/lrep/flex/data/~a9jzRjGlwBHbsAUULWgdfQ+2JAU=~/customer.customer.fin.cash.bankmaster.manage.extension",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      },
      {
        "id": "sap.ui.fl",
        "componentId": "sap.ui.fl",
        "type": "UI5LIB",
        "url": "",
        "descriptorUrl": "",
        "error": false,
        "noDescriptor": false
      }
    ],
    "error": false,
    "noDescriptor": false
  }
}

What am I doing wrong?

Best regards

entry.title: Reload an Object Page with a different record after a custom action
entry.content:
Greetings, community experts.

I am working on a SAP CAP app (NodeJS) with SAP Fiori Elements on SAP BTP. At the SAP Fiori Elements level I am also using some Extension.

What I want to do is simple to explain: After executing certain custom action on an Object Page, I need to reload that page, but with changing the key, to display another object, i.e. another record of the same entity... For example, the Object Page is displaying Batch 10001, and after the custom action, the object page should reload and display Batch 10015.

How could I do this?

Thanks in advance for any help and/or suggestions.

entry.title: Fiori Elements OData V4 draft create navigates to transient $uid path instead of server draft path,
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am facing an issue in a CAP + Fiori Elements OData V4 draft application

Problem:

 When I press Create in one specific config app (AggrConfigService / Aggregator), the draft creation flow breaks.

The UI navigates/binds to a transient client-side path like: AggrConfigService.Aggregator($uid=id-1773199858692-511)

CAP then returns: 404 Invalid resource path "AggrConfigService.Aggregator($uid=...)" What is strange is that the POST itself succeeds first.

Observed request/response

1) Create request: POST Aggregator Body: {"AggregatorID":"Test"}

Response: HTTP/1.1 204 No Content location: Aggregator.drafts('Test') 2) Immediately after that, UI5 sends: GET Aggregator($uid=id-1773199858692-511)?$select=AggregatorID,AggregatorName,HasActiveEntity,HasDraftEntity,IsActive,IsActiveEntity&$expand=DraftAdministrativeData($select=DraftIsCreatedByMe,DraftUUID,InProcessByUser) Response: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found {"error":{"code":"404","message":"Invalid resource path \"AggrConfigService.Aggregator($uid=id-1773199858692-511)\""}}

So the backend seems to create the draft successfully and returns a draft location, but the frontend still tries to read via the transient $uid path instead of switching to the canonical draft path.

Environment:

SAP CAP Node.js - @sap/cds 8.9.8 - SAPUI5 1.142.0 - Fiori Elements OData V4 - Draft-enabled service - Cloud Foundry deployment on BTP

Questions:

1) Has anyone seen Fiori Elements OData V4 draft create navigate to a transient `$uid` path like this after a successful POST?

2) Is there any known issue/pattern where FE object-page routing or binding keeps the transient context instead of resolving to the canonical draft location returned by CAP?

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori Elements SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  OData SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: Standard date format issue in Smart Business KPI report
entry.content:
Hi All,

we're facing an issue with Date-Display for CDS-Based Queries in Smart Business KPIs. The date values are not displayed according to user settings (for example dd.mm.yyyy). Instead, the KPI report shows dates in internal format yyyymmdd. Standard format is not working dd.mm.yyyy (yyyymmdd) .

  • In the KPI report (Manage KPIs and Reports), all date fields display as yyyymmdd.
  • The expected behavior is that dates should follow the user’s regional/date settings (e.g., dd.mm.yyyy(yyyymmdd)).

  • In the OData service response, the date dimension contains two fields:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate
    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

  • We are not explicitly defining any _T fields in our CDS views, but the _T field still appears in OData.

  • The OData service is using standard generic analytics runtime classes:

    • MPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_MPC
    • DPC: CL_NAT_GENERIC_DPC

  • When I inspect the Fiori KPI app network calls, the GET request uses $select, but it does not include:

    • PlannedGoodsIssueDate_T

    So the KPI report only fetches PlannedGoodsIssueDate and the _T field never reaches the UI.

 

  1. What is the recommended way to ensure date fields are displayed in the user’s date format in KPI tiles?
  2. Is there any known configuration / best practice / SAP note to address this issue?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

PA

entry.title: oModel.read is not working - OData V2
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new on the SAP BTP/BAS world and I am trying to read a oData model v2 but it is not working.

return Controller.extend("XXX", {
    onInit: async function () { 
      try {
        await this._PickedMaterials(); 
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        MessageBox.error("Not able to select picket items.");
      }
    },

And here is my funcion _Picked Material

  _PickedMaterials: async function () {
debugger;
var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2_CDS");
oModel.read("/C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2", {
        urlParameters: { "$top": 20 },
        success: function (data) {
          console.log("SUCCESS DATA:", data);
          console.log("RESULTS:", data.results);
          debugger; 
        },
        error: function (err) {
          console.error("READ ERROR:", err);
          debugger; 
        }
      });

The code reaches the first debugger in the function but it does not enter the sucess or the error conditions. 


oModel is correct:

 and on debug mode shows like this:


Then it gets to oModel.read("/C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2", { It just jumps straight away

I have some console.logs in place like 

oModel.setUseBatch(false);

oModel.attachRequestSent((e) => {
        console.log("RequestSent:", e.getParameters()); // url, method, async, etc.
      });

C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2 is maintained in the backend and response is 200
I can also see the Live data for C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2_CDS in Service Center in BAS
OData was added using Service Manager
There is a API being used and working in this app

Any idea what is wrong here?

Thanks
Andréa

entry.title: Best IDE for Fiori Development with NetWeaver 7.52 SP4 (MiniSAP)
entry.content:
Hello,
I am looking for recommendations on the most suitable IDE for developing Fiori applications with NetWeaver 7.52 SP4 (MiniSAP). I initially attempted to use Visual Studio Code, but encountered issues when trying to connect the MiniSAP system to the IDE. Specifically, VS Code does not seem to detect OData v4 services from MiniSAP.
My assumption is that MiniSAP may have limitations regarding OData v4 support. Given this, I would like to know if there are alternative IDEs that offer capabilities comparable to VS Code for Fiori application development.
Thank you in advance for your insights.
Best regards,
Dariel Alves.

entry.title: Semantic Object Navigation not working for Alternative Entity in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a Fiori Elements List Report application where semantic object navigation works correctly for my main service entity Case, but it does not work for an alternative entity ErpCase.

Scenario:

  • Main service entity: Case

  • Alternative entity: ErpCase

  • The List Report is generated using the main entity Case.

  • Semantic object navigation is configured and works correctly when the navigation originates from the Case entity.

However, I also expose ErpCase as an alternative entity with its own route (for example navigating to an ErpCase object page). When the navigation originates from ErpCase , the semantic object navigation does not trigger.

If anyone has implemented semantic navigation for alternative entities in a List Report, I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Error 404 during Fiori App deployment from VS Code to S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi all,

Need your help on this issue. I have look around and test whatever solution I can find to solve this but the error is still there. Don't know what settings or services we need to fix.

My case is that after I generate the Fiori application and preview it without issue, I got error 404 during Fiori App deployment from VS Code to S4HANA. To be precise, the message from npm was:

 

error abap-deploy-task ZFI_BATCHLOG0 Request failed with status code 404
error abap-deploy-task ZFI_BATCHLOG0 <html><head></head><body>File NOT found!</body></html>
error abap-deploy-task ZFI_BATCHLOG0 Deployment has failed.
error abap-deploy-task ZFI_BATCHLOG0 Change logging level to debug your issue
error abap-deploy-task ZFI_BATCHLOG0 (see examples https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/tree/main/packages/deploy-tooling#configuration-with-logging-enabled)error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Request failed with status code 404. For more information, see the Guided Answers guide: https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/3046/actions/45995:45996:45999:46000:46002
error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Request failed with status code 404
Command deploy failed with error : Request failed with status code 404

I have tried the guided answer as well but the issue is still there. 

Kind regards,

Adhimas

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Exam Booking Availability for C_FIOAD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I am interested in scheduling the C_FIOAD certification exam. However, when I attempt to book the exam, but the Exam  is not yet available for booking.

Can anybody help me with the Information, when the C_FIOAD exam will be available for scheduling? I would appreciate any information regarding the expected timeline for booking availability.
Thank you in Advacne

Kind regards,
Venkata Nagendra Reddy Vardhireddy

entry.title: Which Fiori apps are essential for FI and CO in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
We are currently transitioning our SAP S/4HANA users from classic SAP GUI transactions to the Fiori Launchpad.
I am responsible for defining which Fiori apps should replace our existing transaction set.

I have the following questions:
1. What are the most important and commonly used Fiori apps for Financial Accounting (FI) — e.g. for document posting, clearing, open item management, and reporting?
2. What are the key Fiori apps for Controlling (CO) — e.g. cost center reporting, internal orders, profitability analysis?
3. Is there an official SAP mapping list of classic transactions (e.g. FB60, FB70, F110, KSB1) to their Fiori app equivalents?
4. What is the recommended approach for a phased Fiori rollout — all at once or area by area?
5. Are there any apps that have known limitations compared to the classic transaction counterpart? We are on SAP S/4HANA on-premise. Any tips, app lists, or migration experiences are very welcome! Thank you!

entry.title: Implementing a Public/Anonymous SAPUI5 Registration App on BTP with Backend Data Validation
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I am working on a registration application using SAPUI5 on SAP BTP. I have a prototype ready, but I need guidance on two specific technical issues:

  1. Deployment for public access: How can I deploy this registration app so it is publicly available for anyone to use without requiring a login or IAS authentication? I need the app to be accessible to external users who do not have system credentials.
  2. Accessing system data for verification: How can I securely access our backend system data from this public application? The goal is to verify if a customer already exists in our system (e.g., checking by Email or BP) before they register. Since the user is anonymous, what is the best way to handle the connection to the backend?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Manage change record Fiori app valid from field
entry.content:
In the Manage Change Record (F2097) Fiori app, is it possible to enable the Valid-From date? I tried configuring it in SPRO, but unfortunately, I was not successful.

How can we enable the Valid-From date or Effective Engineering Date in the Fiori app?

entry.title: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE table is not displayed on Object page
entry.content:
I'm trying to display a Table in a section of the Object page of a List Report.

My main CDS view ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER is :

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Business Partners report'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@OData.publish: true
@UI.headerInfo: { typeName: 'BusinessPartner', imageUrl: 'BusinessPartnerImageURL', title: { value: 'BusinessPartnerName', type: #STANDARD }, description: { value: 'BusinessPartner', type: #STANDARD } }

define root view entity ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER as select from I_BusinessPartner
  composition [0..*] of ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER_BANK    as _Bank
  association [0..1] to I_BusinessPartnerGrouping   as _BusinessPartnerGrouping     on $projection.BusinessPartnerGrouping  = _BusinessPartnerGrouping.BusinessPartnerGrouping
{
  .facet: [
    {
        id: 'Info',
        type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
        position: 10,
        purpose: #HEADER,
        targetQualifier: 'Info'
    },
    {
        id: 'Addr',
        label: 'Address',
        type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
        position: 20,
        purpose: #HEADER,
        targetQualifier: 'Address'
    },
    {
        id: 'Contact',
        label: 'Contact',
        type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
        position: 30,
        purpose: #HEADER,
        targetQualifier: 'Contact'
    },
    {
        id: 'Bank',
        label: 'Banks',
        type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
        position: 10,
        targetQualifier: 'Bank',
        targetElement: '_Bank'
     }
  ]

  .lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]
  .selectionField: [{position: 10}]
  .textArrangement: #TEXT_SEPARATE
  .defaultSearchElement: true
  .fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
  .ranking: #HIGH
  key I_BusinessPartner.BusinessPartner,
  
  @ObjectModel.readOnly: true
  @ObjectModel.virtualElement
  @ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:CL_MD_BP_ROOT_CALC_EXIT'
  cast( '' as abap.sstring( 260 ) )                                          as BusinessPartnerImageURL,
  
  [...]
  
  _Bank

}

View ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER_BANK:

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Business Partners Bank'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define view entity ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER_BANK as select from I_BusinessPartnerBank
  association to parent ZC_BUSINESS_PARTNER as _BusinessPartner on $projection.BusinessPartner = _BusinessPartner.BusinessPartner
{
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
key BusinessPartner,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
key BankIdentification,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 30, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
BankCountryKey,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 40, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
BankName,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 50, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
BankNumber,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 60, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
SWIFTCode,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 70, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
BankControlKey,
@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 80, qualifier: 'Bank'}]
BankAccountHolderName,

[...]

/* Associations */
_Bank,
_BusinessPartner,
_BusinessPartnerBankAlias,
_IBAN
}

The object page simply does not display the Banks section.

Please help.

entry.title: new field to post goods receipt fiori tile
entry.content:
Hello,

there is a requirement got to me, to Add a total item amount field in "POST GOODS RECEIPT for purchasing Documents " in the fiori. The total amount should only display for the selected items.

Since i am new to Fiori can i get some help to implement this.

regards, 

krishna

entry.title: adding a ew field in post goods receipt page in fiori
entry.content:
hello,

I have a requirement with me to add a field called total item amount in the post good receipt for purchase documents page in fiori. The catch is the total amount should be only for seletced number of items.

Since i am new to fiori , can anyone help me on implementation of this req.

regards,

krishna

entry.title: Custom Business Configuration Sorting the Table using Non-KeyFields
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently using the Custom Business Configuration and have generated some entities. I am currently having issue sorting the table, I have tried using annotations like the one below in the Metadata Extension.


Seems like even with this, it is getting ignored and still sorts by key fields.

Scenario:

Operation - KeyfieldCounter - KeyfieldCountry - Non-Keyfield
Flight1V
Flight2A
Flight3D

I want to be able to sort the table by default when opening the application by country which is not a key field and ignore the keyfields with the expected output:

Operation - KeyfieldCounter - KeyfieldCountry - Non - Keyfield
Flight2A
Flight3D
Flight1V

In this case, the keyfields was set to hidden for user and will only see the country column, so users would want it to be sorted.

Does anyone have any work around on this?

entry.title: Struggling to automate SAP WebGUI testing.
entry.content:
Struggling with automating SAP GUI for HTML (WebGUI) using OPA5 — wondering if others have faced the same.

While OPA5 works well for UI5 apps, things start breaking down when WebGUI comes into the picture. Since WebGUI runs inside an iframe and isn’t a UI5 application, OPA5 doesn’t seem to recognize or interact with those elements at all.

Some of the issues I’ve been hitting:

• Unable to locate or interact with WebGUI elements using OPA5
• Controls exist in DOM but OPA5 cannot access them
• Dynamic IDs and rendering make selectors unreliable
• Switching context to iframe isn’t supported in OPA5 the way it’s needed
• Hybrid apps (UI5 + WebGUI) create a major gap in automation strategy

At this point, I’m trying to figure out if there’s a reliable way to handle WebGUI automation within an OPA5-based setup — or if a completely different approach is needed.

Would love to hear if anyone has tackled this problem or found a workaround.

#SAP #OPA5 #WebGUI #TestAutomation #UI5

entry.title: Homepage redesign customization level — SAP Signavio Process Navigator — what's feasible within Fior
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm working on the SAP Signavio Process Navigator team and we are redesigning our application homepage. The current version (Attachment 1) uses standard Fiori / Unified controls. Our stakeholders want a more modern, visually engaging look, so we've created a redesigned version (Attachment 2).

The redesign stays within the SAP color palette and overall Fiori spirit, but introduces heavier customization across typography, card layouts, background treatments, and some custom widgets that go beyond what standard Fiori controls offer out of the box.

My questions:

  1. Is this level of customization acceptable and compliant with SAP Fiori / SAP UX guidelines?
  2. Would the recommendation be to stay with the current standard design, or is it reasonable to adopt the kind of customizations shown in the redesigned version?

Screenshots of both versions are attached. Any guidance is appreciated — thank you!
